Name: Squat
Form Tip: Keep chest up, brace core, weight on mid-foot, knees track over toes
Common Mistakes: Knees cave inward | Lower back rounds | Weight shifts to toes

Name: Deadlift
Muscles Targeted: Glutes | Hamstrings | Lower Back | Core | Lats
Form Tip: Keep bar close, hinge at hips, neutral spine, push floor away
Common Mistakes: Rounded back | Bar drifts forward | Hips rise too fast

Name: Bench Press
Form Tip: Retract shoulders, feet planted, touch lower chest with control
Common Mistakes: Elbows flare too much | Bouncing bar | Lifting hips off bench

Name: Overhead Press
Form Tip: Brace core, squeeze glutes, press bar overhead in straight path
Common Mistakes: Overarching lower back | Pressing forward | Incomplete lockout

Name: Barbell Row
Muscles Targeted: Lats | Rhomboids | Rear Delts | Biceps | Core
Form Tip: Hinge torso, pull elbows back, keep spine neutral
Common Mistakes: Jerking weight | Rounded back | Standing too upright

Name: Pull Up
Form Tip: Start from dead hang, drive elbows down, chest toward bar
Common Mistakes: Kipping excessively | Half reps | Shrugged shoulders

Name: Chin Up
Form Tip: Use full range, keep chest tall, control lowering phase
Common Mistakes: Swinging body | Short reps | Neck reaching upward

Name: Lat Pulldown
Form Tip: Pull bar to upper chest, keep torso slightly leaned back
Common Mistakes: Pulling behind neck | Using momentum | Shrugging shoulders

Name: Seated Cable Row
Muscles Targeted: Mid Back | Lats | Biceps | Rear Delts
Form Tip: Sit tall, pull handle to torso, squeeze shoulder blades
Common Mistakes: Rounding shoulders | Leaning back too much | Using arms only

Name: Dumbbell Row
Form Tip: Keep hips square, pull elbow to hip, control descent
Common Mistakes: Twisting torso | Shrugging shoulder | Jerking weight

Name: Romanian Deadlift
Form Tip: Soft knees, hinge hips back, keep dumbbells close
Common Mistakes: Turning into squat | Rounded back | Going too low

Name: Hip Thrust
Form Tip: Chin tucked, ribs down, squeeze glutes at top
Common Mistakes: Overarching back | Pushing through toes | Incomplete lockout

Name: Lunge
Form Tip: Step long enough, torso tall, front foot planted
Common Mistakes: Front knee collapsing inward | Tiny step length | Leaning forward

Name: Bulgarian Split Squat
Form Tip: Front foot far enough forward, descend straight down
Common Mistakes: Pushing off rear leg | Wobbling stance | Knee cave

Name: Leg Press
Form Tip: Keep lower back on pad, control depth, drive evenly
Common Mistakes: Locking knees hard | Butt lifting off seat | Shallow reps

Name: Leg Extension
Form Tip: Control tempo, squeeze quads at top
Common Mistakes: Swinging weight | Slamming stack | Partial reps

Name: Leg Curl
Form Tip: Keep hips down, curl smoothly, pause at contraction
Common Mistakes: Using momentum | Hips lifting | Fast negatives

Name: Calf Raise
Form Tip: Full stretch at bottom, pause at top
Common Mistakes: Bouncing reps | Short range | Leaning excessively

Name: Glute Bridge
Form Tip: Drive through heels, ribs down, squeeze glutes
Common Mistakes: Overarching back | Knees flaring too much | Rushing reps

Name: Push Up
Form Tip: Body straight, hands under shoulders, chest to floor
Common Mistakes: Sagging hips | Flaring elbows | Half reps

Name: Incline Dumbbell Press
Form Tip: Shoulders back, lower dumbbells with control
Common Mistakes: Bouncing weights | Excessive arch | Elbows too wide

Name: Dips
Form Tip: Lean slightly forward, shoulders packed, full control
Common Mistakes: Shrugging shoulders | Going too deep painfully | Swinging

Name: Chest Fly
Form Tip: Soft elbows, wide arc, squeeze chest together
Common Mistakes: Too much elbow bend | Dropping too low | Using momentum

Name: Lateral Raise
Form Tip: Raise to shoulder height, lead with elbows
Common Mistakes: Swinging torso | Shrugging traps | Going too heavy

Name: Rear Delt Fly
Form Tip: Hinge slightly, arms wide, control motion
Common Mistakes: Jerking reps | Using traps only | Neck tension

Name: Face Pull
Muscles Targeted: Rear Delts | Rotator Cuff | Upper Back
Form Tip: Pull rope to face, elbows high, rotate outward
Common Mistakes: Lower back lean | Too heavy | Pulling to chest

Name: Bicep Curl
Form Tip: Keep elbows pinned, full stretch and squeeze
Common Mistakes: Swinging body | Elbows drifting forward | Partial reps

Name: Hammer Curl
Form Tip: Neutral grip, control both directions
Common Mistakes: Using momentum | Shrugging shoulders | Fast lowering

Name: Tricep Pushdown
Form Tip: Elbows fixed at sides, full extension
Common Mistakes: Elbows moving forward | Leaning bodyweight | Half reps

Name: Skull Crusher
Form Tip: Lower behind forehead, elbows steady
Common Mistakes: Flaring elbows | Dropping too fast | Excessive weight

Name: Plank
Form Tip: Brace abs, squeeze glutes, body straight line
Common Mistakes: Sagging hips | Holding breath | Looking forward

Name: Hanging Leg Raise
Form Tip: Posteriorly tilt pelvis, control swing
Common Mistakes: Using momentum | Short range | Shrugged shoulders

Name: Russian Twist
Form Tip: Rotate torso, keep chest lifted
Common Mistakes: Only moving arms | Rounded back | Going too fast

Name: Farmer Carry
Form Tip: Stand tall, walk controlled, shoulders down
Common Mistakes: Leaning sideways | Tiny steps rushed | Looking down

Name: Shrug
Form Tip: Lift shoulders straight up, pause briefly
Common Mistakes: Rolling shoulders | Jerking weight | Neck jutting

Name: Arnold Press
Form Tip: Rotate smoothly, keep core tight
Common Mistakes: Overarching back | Too heavy | Inconsistent path

Name: Front Squat
Form Tip: Elbows high, chest proud, sit between hips
Common Mistakes: Elbows dropping | Heels lifting | Rounded upper back

Name: Sumo Deadlift
Form Tip: Wide stance, chest tall, push knees out
Common Mistakes: Hips too high | Knees collapsing | Bar far from body

Name: Goblet Squat
Form Tip: Hold weight close, elbows down, torso upright
Common Mistakes: Falling forward | Heels lifting | Shallow depth

Name: Step Up
Form Tip: Drive through top foot, stand fully tall
Common Mistakes: Pushing off rear foot | Knee cave | Unstable box
